CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. Select Yes if this is the first purchase transaction for the property by a homebuyer in the program. If this is a resale, select No.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Select Yes if this is the first purchase transaction for the property by a homebuyer in the program.
If this is a resale, select No.
CustomField.label: Initial Purchase
